title: croton chrysocladus
intro: Croton chrysocladus, also known as the Ironwood tree or Yellow Croton, is a species of tree in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In herbal preparations, Croton chrysocladus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
